featureDefs.name: Storage driver soyutlamasi
featureDefs.desc: Local/S3/R2/Azure/GCS/MinIO tek Protocol arkasinda (put/get/delete/signed_url/copy/head). Backend degisimi core kodunu etkilemez.

featureDefs.name: Pre-signed URL yukleme
featureDefs.desc: Istemci sunucudan gecmeden dogrudan storage'a yukler; kisa omurlu imzali URL. Sunucu yuku ve gecikme azalir.

featureDefs.name: Versioning zinciri
featureDefs.desc: file_version: content hash + kim + ne zaman, immutable. Rollback opsiyonu; Drive icin block-level delta + CRDT ustune.

featureDefs.name: Lifecycle / TTL
featureDefs.desc: Temp 24s, abandoned asset 7g, 90g sonra cold storage. Storage policy veya scheduled worker ile.

integration.shouldIntegrate: Evet — Layer-1 in-tree primitive; tum ust katmanlar dosya isini buradan alir.
integration.kernel: Authz (signed_url erisimi capability-bagli), tenancy (blob key tenant-scoped), event-bus (FileUploaded).
integration.core: FileMetadata Contract satiri; MIME validation + virus scan pipeline.
integration.modules: s-drive (Block Storage: content-addressable, FastCDC dedup), AI moderation + search index (FileUploaded dinler).
integration.apps: Her form 'dosya ekle' alani, thumbnail/HLS variant uretimi.

securityNotes: Pre-signed URL deny-by-default: yalniz capability file:write olan aktor icin uretilir; kisa TTL, tek kullanim hedefli key.
MIME validation + virus scan (ClamAV) final blob CDN'e gitmeden; content-type spoofing reddedilir.
signed_url okuma da capability-bagli; tenant izolasyonu blob key prefix + RLS metadata ile.
Versiyon kaydi immutable: content hash ile butunluk; rollback yeni surum uretir, eskiyi silmez (audit).

perfNotes.code: Upload temp blob'a; thumbnail (64/256/1024) ve HLS transcode asenkron worker'da, FileUploaded event ile tetiklenir.
perfNotes.perf: Pre-signed URL ile buyuk dosyalar sunucuyu bypass eder; CDN push ile okuma olceklenir. Cold storage gecisi maliyeti dusurur.

testNotes: file:write capability'si olmayan aktore signed PUT URL uretilmemeli.
Yanlis MIME / viruslu icerik final blob'a gecmemeli.
Versiyon rollback eski icerigi silmemeli (immutable zincir).
